title: If a user specifies --entrypoint it should clear the cmd field
body:
This matches the way that docker build and buildah bud works.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: This is failing in the same spot that my #596 is.  I think they're inter-related.  I'm going to merge this into my sanbox and see if by chance the combo fixes straightens out the tests.  I think it just might.
